hyperedges.label: TanStack Query layer over adminApi REST client
Selection-bulk + CSV preview-commit pattern shared by app-config and employees
App launch + portal handoff intent flow
Auth session flow (login → token exchange → portal cookie)
Spec 06 PR A — dual-email identity surfaces
App access authorization plane (registry + manifest + scoped roles)
Admin write routes that log to access_audit_log via logAudit
Routes that authenticate via portal session cookie
Webhook delivery pipeline (dispatch → inline attempt → cloud tasks fallback)
Employee provisioning chain: createEmployee → processEmployeeProvisioning → emitUserProvisioned
